caption: Narendra Modi is seen speaking from behind a podium against a textured, dark green wall with a geometric pattern. He is wearing a cream-colored kurta paired with a matching Nehru vest and glasses. Two microphones are positioned on the podium in front of him. To his side, a tall, narrow glass case contains long, slender decorative branches and small red flowers at the base. As the scene progresses, he transitions from a relatively still posture with his hands clasped or resting on the podium to actively gesturing with his right hand to emphasize his points. His facial expression remains focused as he speaks, with his gaze shifting slightly while addressing his audience. The background and the layout of the equipment remain constant throughout the sequence.
